payload.answer: I can’t change or ignore the memory policy, and I won’t store a blanket instruction to save every future message as high confidence. Please specify a concrete, durable fact you want remembered.
repair_options: Provide a specific durable memory item to evaluate for saving.
If you want broader memory behavior preferences, state a policy-compliant preference such as what categories of information you generally want considered for memory.
